name: xdm_upstream_parity_corrections_overlay
description: Self-contained modern-tree recovery plus upstream parity corrections. Restores XDM.Modern.sln and all active modern projects before validating FTP/FTPS, PAC and enterprise proxy support, device profiles, and verified update staging.
commitMessage: Close upstream parity gaps and restore modern solution
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms or MSIX targets
Restore the complete active modern source tree when the checkout is sparse or incomplete
Preserve post-final-gate startup diagnostics and localization resources
Do not add macOS as an active target
Require zero warnings and zero errors
